PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Jun-04-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Judith Baer for and with Stella Gonzalez (Petitioner). Anne Steele for and with Ben Ruvacalba (Petitioner). Selena Gonzalez (Daughter of Stella) also present.

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to who has priority to serve as Administrator. The Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administation appointing Stella Gonzalez as Administrator (subject to review of the order). Bond in the amount of $150,000.00 is required.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-06-2012 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-30-2012 Continued To Jun-04-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
